    _picker_change() {
        if (!this._timepicker.validity.badInput) {
            this.model.set('value', this._timepicker.value, { updated_view: this });
            this.touch();
        }

    _picker_focusout() {
        if (this._timepicker.validity.badInput) {
            this.model.set('value', null, { updated_view: this });
            this.touch();
        }
    }
